title: synaedrys calathiformis
intro: Synaedrys calathiformis, also known as the basket tree or basket staghorn sumac, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and parts of Asia. The plant's bark, roots, and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. Synaedrys calathiformis has been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and its extracts have been shown to have antioxidant and hepatoprotective effects, potentially reducing oxidative stress and liver damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, or used as a topical application to alleviate skin conditions and wounds.
